---
title: "Events"
---

## LACSC–TIES–EnviBayes–EnvrASA 2026

**International Conference on Statistics, Data Science, and Computing for the Environment and Climate Change**

- **When:** 7–11 December 2026  
- **Where:** Mexico City, Mexico  

The meeting is jointly organized by UNAM, IASC–LARS, AME, TIES, **EnviBayes (ISBA)**, and ENVR (ASA). Details and participation information:

- Conference site: [amestad.mx/lacsc-ties-envibayes-envrasa-2026](https://www.amestad.mx/lacsc-ties-envibayes-envrasa-2026)
- Call for papers (IASC–ISI notice): [Call for papers — LACSC–TIES–EnviBayes–EnvrASA 2026](https://iasc-isi.org/2026/02/08/call-for-papers-of-the-lacsc-ties-envibayes-envrasa-2026/)

For other section activities and archived announcements, see the [Events area on the official ISBA EnviBayes page](https://bayesian.org/sectionschapters/environmental-sciences/).
